channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][CAST] Anime News Network Cyborg 009: Nemesis 动画 Casts Mamoru Miyano as Cyborg 002
item.description: Miyano voices Jet Link, who can fly at Mach 5, in summer series ― The staff of Ishimori Production's Cyborg 009: Nemesis, a new anime based on Shōtarō Ishinomori's Cyborg 009 manga, announced on... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Cyborg 009: Nemesis Anime Casts Mamoru Miyano as Cyborg 002

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network HIDIVE Stream World is Dancing 动画
item.description: Anime debuts on HIDIVE on June 29 with world premiere of 2nd episode at Anime Expo on July 2 ― The Anime Corner website reported on Monday that HIDIVE will stream the television anime of Kazuto... | 来源: ANN | 原文: HIDIVE to Stream The World is Dancing Anime

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network 动画 Expo Hosts Sega的 Takashi Iizuka, Kazuhisa Wada, Shigenori Soejima, More Guests
item.description: Also: Yoshiyuki Asai, Atsushi Nomura, guests from Blade & Bastard, DRECOM ― Sega announced on Monday that this year's Anime Expo event will host the following guests, who will be at panels and... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Anime Expo Hosts Sega's Takashi Iizuka, Kazuhisa Wada, Shigenori Soejima, More Guests

item.title: [续作][公开] Anime News Network Blue Lock 季度 3 公开 Neo Egoist League Subtitle, Visual
